author: Brandon Bachmeier
name: Better Media v2
description: Phase 1 — title + artist fed from the host. Polls /api/media/now-playing on the 127.0.0.1:8976 host service every 1.5s. No images, no buttons, no Spotify, no lyrics. Pure DOM updates via textContent. Installs alongside the original Better Media so you can A/B-test flicker.
